ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or label for the data point (e.g., testing, production) */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection session */,
  "machine_status" TEXT /* Status of the machine at the time of data collection (e.g., running, idle, stopped) */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment being monitored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data collection */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data collection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine where the data was collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection session */,
  "collection_type" TEXT /* Type of data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., real-time, hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the location is located */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., production, testing, storage) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the machine is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of machine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the machine */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machines_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES machine_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine type */,
  "power_rating" REAL /* Power rating of the machine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., production, warehouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, maintenance, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection session accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high power usage, low voltage) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., regular check, repair) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., clear, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the weather data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_weather_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data point */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_weather_mapping_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_weather_mapping_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., motor, pump) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection session analyzed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., energy consumption, efficiency) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data used for the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("training_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of training data */,
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection session used for training */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training data */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the training data */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the training data (e.g., good, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_data_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_collection_id")
)
